parameters.query:
WITH yesterday AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ (new Date(Date.now() - 86400000)).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}'::DATE AS metric_date
),
funnel AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'content_view') AS content_views,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'profile_visit') AS profile_visits,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'landing_page_view') AS landing_page_views,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'lead_magnet_download') AS lead_magnet_downloads,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'tripwire_view') AS tripwire_views,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'tripwire_purchase') AS tripwire_sales,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'membership_view') AS membership_views,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'membership_started') AS membership_started,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE stage = 'membership_purchased') AS membership_new_sales
  FROM analytics_funnel_events
  WHERE created_at::DATE = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday)
),
revenue AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'completed' AND dp.product_type = 'tripwire'), 0) AS tripwire_revenue_cents,
    COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'completed' AND dp.product_type = 'membership'), 0) AS membership_revenue_cents,
    COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'completed' AND dp.product_type = 'automation_package'), 0) AS automation_revenue_cents,
    COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents) FILTER (WHERE p.status = 'completed'), 0) AS total_revenue_cents
  FROM purchases p
  JOIN digital_products dp ON dp.id = p.product_id
  WHERE p.created_at::DATE = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday)
),
subscribers AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at::DATE = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday)) AS new_subscribers,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM email_subscribers WHERE status = 'active') AS total_subscribers
  FROM email_subscribers
),
content AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS videos_published
  FROM content_videos
  WHERE published_at::DATE = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday) AND status = 'published'
),
content_views AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(views), 0) AS total_content_views,
    COALESCE(SUM(likes + shares + comments + saves), 0) AS total_engagement
  FROM analytics_content_events
  WHERE event_date = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday)
),
workflows AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'success') AS workflows_run,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS workflows_failed
  FROM automation_execution_logs
  WHERE started_at::DATE = (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday)
)
SELECT
  (SELECT metric_date FROM yesterday) AS metric_date,
  content.videos_published,
  content_views.total_content_views,
  content_views.total_engagement,
  funnel.profile_visits,
  funnel.landing_page_views,
  funnel.lead_magnet_downloads,
  funnel.tripwire_sales,
  funnel.membership_new_sales,
  revenue.tripwire_revenue_cents,
  revenue.membership_revenue_cents,
  revenue.automation_revenue_cents,
  revenue.total_revenue_cents,
  subscribers.new_subscribers,
  subscribers.total_subscribers
FROM funnel, revenue, subscribers, content, content_views, workflows;

INSERT INTO analytics_daily_metrics (
  metric_date, videos_published, total_content_views, total_engagement,
  profile_visits, landing_page_views, new_subscribers, total_subscribers,
  lead_magnet_downloads, tripwire_sales, tripwire_revenue_cents,
  membership_new_sales, membership_revenue_cents,
  automation_package_sales, automation_revenue_cents,
  total_revenue_cents, workflows_run, workflows_failed
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  {{ $json.videos_published }}, {{ $json.total_content_views }}, {{ $json.total_engagement }},
  {{ $json.profile_visits }}, {{ $json.landing_page_views }}, {{ $json.new_subscribers }}, {{ $json.total_subscribers }},
  {{ $json.lead_magnet_downloads }}, {{ $json.tripwire_sales }}, {{ $json.tripwire_revenue_cents }},
  {{ $json.membership_new_sales }}, {{ $json.membership_revenue_cents }},
  0, 0, {{ $json.total_revenue_cents }},
  {{ $json.workflows_run }}, {{ $json.workflows_failed }}
)
ON CONFLICT (metric_date)
DO UPDATE SET
  videos_published = EXCLUDED.videos_published,
  total_content_views = EXCLUDED.total_content_views,
  total_engagement = EXCLUDED.total_engagement,
  profile_visits = EXCLUDED.profile_visits,
  landing_page_views = EXCLUDED.landing_page_views,
  new_subscribers = EXCLUDED.new_subscribers,
  total_subscribers = EXCLUDED.total_subscribers,
  lead_magnet_downloads = EXCLUDED.lead_magnet_downloads,
  tripwire_sales = EXCLUDED.tripwire_sales,
  tripwire_revenue_cents = EXCLUDED.tripwire_revenue_cents,
  membership_new_sales = EXCLUDED.membership_new_sales,
  membership_revenue_cents = EXCLUDED.membership_revenue_cents,
  total_revenue_cents = EXCLUDED.total_revenue_cents,
  workflows_run = EXCLUDED.workflows_run,
  workflows_failed = EXCLUDED.workflows_failed,
  updated_at = NOW();

WITH yesterday AS (
  SELECT '{{ (new Date(Date.now() - 86400000)).toISOString().split('T')[0] }}'::DATE AS event_date
),
daily AS (
  SELECT
    video_id,
    SUM(views) AS views_daily,
    SUM(likes) AS likes_daily,
    SUM(shares) AS shares_daily,
    SUM(comments) AS comments_daily,
    SUM(saves) AS saves_daily
  FROM analytics_content_events
  WHERE event_date = (SELECT event_date FROM yesterday)
  GROUP BY video_id
)
UPDATE content_videos cv
SET
  total_views = total_views + daily.views_daily,
  total_likes = total_likes + daily.likes_daily,
  total_shares = total_shares + daily.shares_daily,
  total_comments = total_comments + daily.comments_daily,
  total_saves = total_saves + daily.saves_daily
FROM daily
WHERE cv.id = daily.video_id;

parameters.subject: =MindFrame Daily Metrics — {{ $json.metric_date }}
